name: Solid API Auth (server-side DPoP-bound access-token verifier)

stack.node-pin: undici 8.5.0 (consumer-resolved; used by the default guarded WebID fetch)
stack.adapters: framework-free verifyRequest(headers, method, url) core + ./next route-handler subexport
stack.test: vitest ^2.x (53-case adversarial suite + seam tests; real `dpop` round-trip)

consolidates: accessradar/src/lib/solid/api-auth.ts (the reference implementation this is extracted from)

federation.membershipTodo: SDK (not an app) — a server-side authentication/authorization primitive. It verifies DPoP-bound Solid-OIDC access tokens for an app's own write API and authorizes a single owner WebID; it holds no federation membership of its own. The 5 revenue products (AccessRadar + Keystone/CapNote/Provena/Furlong) consume it to gate their /api/** routes.
